summary: Diff implements notification preference types (triggers + appearance), adds a persisted per-user preferences migration, adds a notification settings UI in Profile, and introduces an in-app notification watcher/toaster that uses preferences for trigger gating and toast placement/styling. However, several unrelated UI/feature changes were introduced, and two hook files that were listed as immutable constraints appear to have been modified.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified an immutable hook file (useInternetIdentity) despite the constraint to not modify immutable hook files.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly prohibits modifying immutable hook files listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT (example given: useInternetIdentity). The diff shows changes in this file.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified an immutable hook file (useActor) despite the constraint to not modify immutable hook files listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT (example given: useActor).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly prohibits modifying immutable hook files listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT (example given: useActor). The diff shows changes in this file.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/changed session validation behavior that signs out expired users and calls backend cleanup methods.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; introduces new auth/session behavior unrelated to in-app notifications/preferences.

hallucinated_features.description: Changed Header navigation to include a tooltip message on the Lake Locations tab.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; unrelated UI enhancement.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified Hero/Home page content and layout (feature cards, welcome messaging, grid layout changes).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; unrelated landing page redesign.

hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; unrelated directory UI refactor.

hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; unrelated chat UI changes.
Not requested by any REQ; unrelated footer change.
